name: koreshield-web
description: Unified web properties: marketing site, blog, docs, and dashboard

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd koreshield-web && pnpm install && cd ../koreshield-blog && pnpm install && cd ../koreshield-docs && pnpm install && cd ..
scripts.build: pnpm run build:clean && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:blog && pnpm run build:docs && pnpm run build:merge
scripts.build:web: cd koreshield-web && pnpm install && pnpm build && cp -r dist/* ../dist/
scripts.build:blog: cd koreshield-blog && pnpm install && pnpm build && cp -r dist/* ../dist/blog/
scripts.build:docs: cd koreshield-docs && pnpm install && pnpm build && cp -r build/* ../dist/docs/
scripts.preview: pnpm run build && npx http-server dist -p 3000
